findings.location: s9 (DomaとNablarchのデータベースアクセスを併用する)
findings.description: The source provides a concrete use case example explaining when `ConnectionFactoryFromDomaConnection` is needed: the mail library (メール送信ライブラリ) uses Nablarch's DB access internally (メール送信要求 uses database). This context helps an AI assistant recognize when a user's scenario calls for this feature. The knowledge file omits this example.
findings.source_evidence: 例えば、メール送信ライブラリを使用する場合が該当する。(メール送信要求でdatabaseを使用している。)

findings.location: s4 (別トランザクションで実行する)
findings.description: The knowledge file code example adds a closing parenthesis `)` at the end of the `requiresNew(...)` call that does not appear in the source. The source code ends with `DomaDaoRepository.get(ProjectDao.class).insert(project);` without the outer closing paren. This appears to be a silent correction of a syntax error in the source, not a copy of the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source code: `DomaConfig.singleton().getTransactionManager().requiresNew(() -> DomaDaoRepository.get(ProjectDao.class).insert(project);` — no closing `)` for requiresNew

findings.location: s6 (JSR352に準拠したバッチアプリケーションで遅延ロードを行う)
findings.description: The hints are missing several annotations and enum values used in the code examples: `@Select`, `SelectType`, `@Dependent`, `@Named`. These appear in the Dao interface and ItemReader implementation examples and would be useful retrieval hints.
findings.source_evidence: @Select(strategy = SelectType.RETURN) Stream<Project> search(); and @Dependent @Named public class ProjectReader extends AbstractItemReader

findings.location: s8 (複数のデータベースにアクセスする)
